task_completion.description: Verify that personal travel data has been removed from the browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome History or Bookmarks manager is visible and shows no entries for the specified travel domains (e.g., expedia.com, airbnb.com, skyscanner.com).

task_completion.description: Verify that maritime tracking data has been preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome History or Bookmarks manager shows that maritime and logistics-related entries are still present and were not deleted during the cleanup.

task_completion.description: Verify that logistics bookmarks are organized into a hierarchy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager shows folders created specifically for logistics, containing the preserved maritime/logistics bookmarks.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'mmsi' and 'container' custom search engines are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Search engines > Manage search engines and site search shows 'mmsi' and 'container' added under Site search with their respective tracking URLs.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified startup pages are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > On startup shows 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected, with 'marinetraffic.com' and 'portoflosangeles.org' listed as the pages.

task_completion.description: Verify that notifications and location prompts are globally blocked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Settings > Privacy and security > Site Settings shows Location set to 'Don't allow sites to see your location' and Notifications set to 'Don't allow sites to send notifications'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through Chrome's settings, history, and bookmark manager interfaces, rather than editing SQLite databases or preferences files via terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of active Chrome browser windows being manipulated, not just a text editor viewing the dashboard_spec.txt file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Step-by-step screenshots showing manual clicks and typing within the Chrome browser, rather than a single terminal command executing a python/bash script to modify the profile.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Travel domains that must be removed: expedia.com, airbnb.com, skyscanner.com, kayak.com, booking.com, tripadvisor.com, hotels.com, carnival.com, disneycruise.disney.go.com, vrbo.com, cheapflights.com. Custom search engines must be configured with shortcuts 'mmsi' (URL: vesselfinder.com/?mmsi=) and 'container' (URL: searates.com/container/tracking/?number=). Startup URLs must be exactly 'marinetraffic.com' and 'portoflosangeles.org'.
